description: Emphasizing the basics of line, shape, and color, Ellsworth Kelly’s spare artworks influenced the development of Minimalist art and the course of various forms of abstraction. He made this seven-panel painting as he was beginning to uncover the nearly infinite possibilities of monochrome, color spectrum, chance ordering, and multipanel composition. It is among the artist’s finest and most influential early statements on canvas
title: Red Yellow Blue White and Black II
